title: Connect the Anydocs MCP Server in Codex
description: Give Codex real access to Anydocs domain tools.

render.markdown:
# Connect the Anydocs MCP Server in Codex

A practical setup is to register `@anydocs/mcp` as a `stdio` MCP server and keep an `AGENTS.md` file in the project root.

That tells Codex to:

1. call `project_open` first
2. call `project_validate` when needed
3. read with `page_list`, `page_find`, and `page_get`
4. write with `page_create`, `page_update`, and `page_set_status`
